title: RANKING THE BEST BMW M3 GENERATIONS
hook: The E92 M3 is the only M3 generation powered by a naturally aspirated V8 engine.
narration: The E92 M3 is the only M3 generation powered by a naturally aspirated V8 engine. The F80 M3 marked the return to a turbocharged inline-six engine, delivering 425 horsepower. The E30 M3 was originally developed as a homologation model for Group A touring car racing. The E46 M3 is renowned for its near-perfect chassis balance and high-revving inline-six engine. Which M3 generation is your favorite?
theme: AI-researched draft for request: Rank the four best BMW M3 generations
